ASS'D TO 218 FOR TRIAL. HON. RALPH J. FLAGEOLLET; CLERK: DAN MACDUFF; REPORTER: TEANNA WARD. THE CASE SETTLES AS FOLLOWS: DEFT TO VACATE 227 BAY ST, APT. 111, SAN FRANCISCO CA BY MIDNIGHT ON 11/20/00. TOTAL DAMAGES = $1,262.20. DEFT TO START $100.00 PER MONTH PAYMENTS TO PLTF COMMENCING 1/15/ 2001. IF DEFT VACATES AND PAYS THE DAMAGES IN FULL, AS SET FORTH ABVOVE, PLTF WILL DISMISS THIS ACTION. IF NOT, PLTF MAY INSTITUTE FURTHER PROCEEDINGS ON AN EX PARTE BASIS. DEFT AND SFHA REPRESENTATIVE GWENDOLYN M. WASHINGTON ARE VOIR- DIRE'D AND CONSENT TO THIS SETTLEMENT. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE A JUDGMENT.
